title: Cambridgeshire and Peterborough NHS Foundation Trust
body: Cambridgeshire and Peterborough NHS Foundation Trust (CPFT) provides community, mental health and learning disability services in Cambridgeshire, England. The trust provides specialist services across the east of England and across Britain.
categories: All Wikipedia articles written in British English
